scripts.verify:clod: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run acceptance:clod:fast
scripts.water:shot:lake-final: npm run water:shot -- --scene lake-shoreline --debug final --out shots/water/lake-final
scripts.water:shot:river-final: npm run water:shot -- --scene river-bend --debug final --out shots/water/river-final
scripts.water:shot:lake-depth: npm run water:shot -- --scene lake-shoreline --debug depth --out shots/water/lake-depth
scripts.water:shot:river-foam: npm run water:shot -- --scene river-bend --debug foam --out shots/water/river-foam
scripts.water:shot:flow: npm run water:shot -- --scene river-bend --debug flow --out shots/water/flow-debug
scripts.water:shot:clipmap: npm run water:shot -- --scene clipmap-boundary --debug clipmap-level --out shots/water/clipmap-debug
scripts.water:shot:refraction: npm run water:shot -- --scene lake-shoreline --debug refraction --out shots/water/lake-refraction
scripts.water:shot:reflection: npm run water:shot -- --scene lake-shoreline --debug reflection --out shots/water/lake-reflection
scripts.water:shot:ssr-hit: npm run water:shot -- --scene lake-shoreline --debug ssrHit --out shots/water/lake-ssr-hit
scripts.water:verify: npm run water:find && npm run water:probe && npm run water:shot -- --scene all --out shots/water/verify
